scripts.install: cd api && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
scripts.build:api: cd api && npm install && npm run build
scripts.kill: taskkill /F /IM node.exe 2>nul || echo Nenhum processo Node encontrado
scripts.executar:local: npm run kill && concurrently "cd web && npm run dev:local" "cd api && npm run start:dev"
scripts.executar:remoto: npm run kill && concurrently "cd web && npm run dev:remote" "cd api && npm run start:dev"
scripts.carga:local: npm run kill && npm run install && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('web/.env.local','NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_REMOTE_API=false\nNEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3001\n')" && concurrently "cd web && npm run dev" "cd api && npm run start:dev"
scripts.carga:remoto: npm run kill && npm run install && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('web/.env.local','NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_REMOTE_API=true\nNEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://ascesa.onrender.com\n')" && concurrently "cd web && npm run dev" "cd api && npm run start:dev"
